\tzpentry{ID3822}{Refactored Derivations Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3822 introduces Refactored Derivations Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \{F,G\} = \sum_{i} \left(\frac{\partial F}{\partial q^i}\frac{\partial G}{\partial p_i} - \frac{\partial G}{\partial q^i}\frac{\partial F}{\partial p_i}\right) + \sum_{i,j,k} \varepsilon^{ijk} \omega^i \frac{\partial F}{\partial \omega^j} \frac{\partial G}{\partial \omega^k}. \]
